title: Add Task URLs
description: Add Google Maps search URLs to scrape places from

content.introduction: Use this format if you already have a direct Google Maps search or place URL. This is best for manual inputs or small-scale targeted searches.

urlFormat.title: URL Format
urlFormat.content:
**Google Maps search URL:**
`https://www.google.com/maps/search/restaurant/@43.3928346,5.2662584,14z`

The URL contains the search query and coordinates for the search area.

rows.description: Hash of your squid configured with the google-maps-leads-scraper crawler
Array of task objects, each containing a `url` field

proTips.content: Only the `url` key is required in each task object.
URLs must match Google Maps search or place format.

seo.title: Add Task URLs - Google Maps Leads Scraper - Lobstr.io API
seo.description: Learn how to add Google Maps search URLs to scrape places using the Lobstr.io API.
